models.name: sglang
models.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.

models.name: PaddleFormers
models.description: PaddleFormers is an easy-to-use library of pre-trained large language model zoo based on PaddlePaddle.

models.name: bitsandbytes
models.description: Accessible large language models via k-bit quantization for PyTorch.

models.name: NewsPilot
models.description: NewsPilot is an automated intelligence analysis system based on Large Language Models (LLM), designed to transform massive global news into personalized, actionable insights. It is not just a news aggregation tool, but a 24/7 intelligent intelligence assistant that understands your profession, holdings, and interests.

models.name: epstein-ranker
models.description: LLM-powered tooling for triaging the U.S. House Oversight & DOJ Epstein document release.

models.name: qalign
models.description: QAlign is a new test-time alignment approach that improves language model performance by using Markov chain Monte Carlo methods.

models.name: mtg-card-generator
models.description: Generates new Magic The Gathering cards using language models and image generation.

models.name: COMPASS
models.description: INFRA-COMPASS is a tool that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to create and maintain an inventory of state and local codes and ordinances applicable to energy infrastructure.

models.name: AI-Voice-Agent
models.description: 🗣️ Build an interactive voice agent that leverages Speech-to-Text, a Large Language Model, and Text-to-Speech for real-time voice interactions.

models.name: synapz
models.description: synapz is a research prototype exploring how large language models can adapt teaching content to different cognitive styles. built over a 48-hour sprint with a strict $50 api budget, this project implements a scientific framework to test whether adaptive teaching produces measurably better results than static approaches.

models.name: Auto-Pentest-LLM
models.description: 🔍 Automate penetration testing with an intelligent agent that organizes security assessments, leveraging local LLMs and Kali Linux for effective exploitation.

models.name: Privacy_Attack_LLMs
models.description: This repository contains research on privacy leakage in LLMs. The project is currently under active research and experimental development. Only the components and results that are permitted for public release are included in this repository.

models.name: Source-Code-Security-Audit-Reviewer
models.description: intelligent auditing tool powered by large language models, supporting GPT, . It automatically detects security vulnerabilities, performance issues

models.name: llm-sasrec
models.description: This project studies whether a Large Language Model (LLM) can be integrated into a recommender system in a limited and practical way at inference time, without training or fine-tuning the LLM itself.

models.name: causaliq-knowledge
models.description: Novel approaches for integrating Large Language Models and human knowledge with statistical causal discovery, enabling domain knowledge incorporation and natural language explanation of results.

models.name: gdpval-realworks
models.description: Benchmark large language models on real expert tasks using a YAML-driven pipeline and live dashboard for the GDPVal Gold Subset.

models.name: landfall
models.description: Focused release pipeline: conventional commits → technical changelogs → LLM-synthesized user-facing release notes

models.name: rag-prototype
models.description: An experimental local RAG-backend modular framework. Ports & Adapters. Disclaimer: this is no longer a prototype, neither an stable release.

models.name: Offenbauch
models.description: A new language for building next generation neural models

models.name: PROG
models.description: New exciting Programming language more efficient and feasible for Ai models

models.name: SparseMind_AI_Architecture
models.description: *SparseMind** is a fundamentally new approach to Large Language Model (LLM) architecture. It completely removes the dense Feed-Forward Network (FFN) found in standard Transformers and replaces it with an **Ultra-Fine-Grained Top-K Slot Router

models.name: Lumina-DiMOO
models.description: 🌟 Generate and understand multimodal content seamlessly with Lumina-DiMOO, an advanced large language model designed for innovative applications.

models.name: memfuse
models.description: MemFuse offers a robust memory layer for large language models, enhancing their performance and efficiency. Join our community on GitHub to explore features, report issues, or request new functionalities! 🐙💻

models.name: llm-factory-toolkit
models.description: A flexible Python toolkit designed to simplify interactions with various Large Language Models (LLMs), supporting features like tool usage and structured output formatting.

models.name: whisper-type
models.description: Convert speech to text offline on Windows using your NVIDIA GPU with fast, accurate, multi-language dictation via OpenAI's Whisper large-v3 model.

models.name: brand-consistency-ai-skill
models.description: Ensure marketing content stays on-brand by using AI to generate, audit, and validate materials across platforms with any large language model.

models.name: free-llm-api-resources
models.description: 🤖 Discover free API access and credits for various legitimate large language model services in one curated resource list.

models.name: Terraform-Based-LLMOps-Platform-for-Evaluation-Gated-Canary-Deployment
models.description: A production-style LLMOps platform that deploys GenAI services on AWS with Terraform, enforces offline evaluation gates before release, supports canary deployments with rollback, and integrates observability and GitHub Actions CI/CD for safer model and prompt delivery.

models.name: social-attention-monitor
models.description: SAM — Social Attention Monitor. A  pipeline for tracking social attention dynamics and sentiment around media releases

models.name: ai-qa-framework
models.description: Requirements-driven AI/LLM QA framework with traceability, release gates, RAG evaluation, and multi-model testing

models.name: ai-sub
models.description: ai-sub is a lightweight content subscription project focused on LLM and AI Coding. It aggregates, curates, and pushes high-signal news updates and blog posts about model releases, tooling, prompting/workflows, and real-world engineering practices—so you can follow the fast-moving AI ecosystem in one place.

models.name: press-release-tracking-llm-agent
models.description: Agent that tracks companies

models.name: ReleaseNotesRec-Agent
models.description: An AI-powered Release Notes & Feedback Analysis Agent built using LangChain, ChromaDB, and LLMs. It collects release notes, Reddit feedback, and real-world user issues, performs sentiment/topic analysis, and delivers accurate insights through a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) workflow.

models.name: aws-announcement-monitor
models.description: AWS Announcement Monitor — a Python agent that scans AWS “What’s New”, blog posts and security bulletins, uses grounding‑enabled LLMs via Bedrock/Nova to classify and score announcements for new services, hardware or features, and emails a daily/weekly report. Ideal for tracking cloud releases with AI assistance.

models.name: ai-movie-information-extractor
models.description: AI Movie Information Extractor is a Streamlit-based web application that uses Large Language Models (LLMs) to extract structured movie metadata from unstructured text.  The system converts raw movie descriptions into organized data such as title, release year, genre, cast, director, themes, and more.

models.name: HowHungryisAIRepo
models.description: This repository powers the “How Hungry is AI?” dashboard and provides the code + data release accompanying our paper on inference-phase (operational) environmental footprints of LLMs.

models.name: LLM-Release-Tracker
models.description: 监控 OpenRouter 模型列表变动，有新增或移除时推送到 Discord Webhook

models.name: github-repo-release-info-pulling
models.description: AI-Agent for pulling GitHub release information with automated browsers and vision models.

models.name: community-release-llm-integration
models.description: AI tasks that interact with LLMs and MCP servers

models.name: ai-agent
models.description: AI-Pulse is an AI research assistant specialized in the Artificial Intelligence industry—covering model releases, architectures, hardware, and breakthrough news from 2025-2026. Unlike standard LLMs, AI-Pulse eliminates "knowledge cutoff" issues by integrating live web search.

models.name: Style-Article-Generator
models.description: Multi-Language Article Style Generator that analyzes the writing style of a reference text using NLP techniques and generates new articles with a similar style using Large Language Models and prompt engineering. Supports HIndi, English, Marathi

models.name: AG-News-Topic-Modeling
models.description: Topic modeling project that analyzes thousands of news articles using Natural Language Processing. Text is cleaned, vectorized, and modeled with Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) to uncover hidden themes, identify dominant topics per article, and extract the most important keywords defining each topic.

models.name: RAG_Assistant_Financial_News
models.description: An AI-powered Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) assistant that analyzes financial news and answers user queries. It retrieves relevant articles using vector search and generates context-aware responses with a large language model.

models.name: NewsShield-AI-Based-Real-Time-Misinformation-Detection-System-Using-LLM
models.description: NewsShield is an AI-based real-time system that uses Large Language Models to analyze news content and instantly detect misinformation. It evaluates context, performs automated fact-checking, and provides credibility scores to deliver reliable and verified information to users.

models.name: news-classification
models.description: News classification pipeline using the Qwen3-4B large language model to automatically categorize articles based on their title and content.

models.name: FakeNewsDetection
models.description: Fake News Detection is a machine learning project that classifies news articles as real or fake using natural language processing techniques. It analyzes text data and predicts authenticity using trained classification models.

models.name: FAKE-NEWS-VERIFICATION-TOOL
models.description: The Fake News Detection & Verification Tool aims to combat misinformation by leveraging  Natural Language Processing (NLP), deep learning models, and real-time fact-checking  APIs. The system will analyze textual content, assess its credibility, and cross-reference facts with  reliable sources.

models.name: batch-7-AICTE_Fake_News_Detection
models.description: This project develops a machine learning model using Python and Natural Language Processing (NLP) to analyze text data and automatically classify news articles as real or fake, aiming to reduce the spread of online misinformation.

models.name: new-language-model
models.description: The New Language Model uses context engineering to facilitate Bible translation.

models.name: fake-news-detection-nlp
models.description: This project focuses on Fake News Detection using Natural Language Processing techniques and classical machine learning models.

models.name: GPT
models.description: This is a simple implementation of a GPT-like language model in PyTorch.  It includes data loading, model definition, training loop, and text generation.  The model is trained on a text file and can generate new text based on the learned patterns. This code is based on the "minGPT" implementation by Andrej Karpathy.
